title: Taste notes
description: The learned taste model, kept as cited natural-language statements per dimension — inspectable and editable by the user, not an opaque vector. The ranker reads these to score; the taste page shows them.

searchId.description: the search this taste belongs to

statement.description: md — the preference in plain language, cited to the signals that support it ('dismissed 3 ground-floor units — avoids ground floor [s12,s15,s19]')

weight.description: 0..1 — how strongly this shifts the score; a dealbreaker is ~1

supportCount.description: how many signals back this statement (evidence, not vibes)

createdAt.description: when the note was first written
